Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory216.png'}
{3: 'That is the information Alpha coerced out of the hiding mermaid by pressing her katana against her throat, the night before the final plan was to be executed.'}
{3: 'At the same time, Luna learns the location of the experimental ultra-high energy antenna cluster.'}
{3: 'Lamia, returning from the Arctic, shares the same fact Huaxu did.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory277.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Luna', 3: 'The Project Winter... This name again.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Y-yes. Everything related to the plan has been transferred to the depths of the laboratory.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: '...Looks like it\'s exactly how you said it would be, Huaxu.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'The Project Winter is the reason the antenna cluster is in the laboratory.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She transfers the name list she has just received to Huaxu.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'So, with this new clue from Lamia, can you give me some information?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Huaxu', 3: 'Checking related records>>>>>>>>Complete.'}
{2: 'Huaxu', 3: 'The relevant personnel record has been found. A search has returned the target\'s activity records.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'Cut to the chase.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Huaxu', 3: 'The information is consistent with the individual named Lamia. Kaplan remains active and is organizing the transfer of items to the underground laboratory.'}
{2: 'Huaxu', 3: 'Based on the contents of the seized message from the target, it is presumed that they are seeking information on other deceased individuals from an encrypted address in Babylonia.'}
{2: 'Huaxu', 3: 'These include your previously searched queries of Rand and Ann, as well as Ravenge and Hiro.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'Lamia, don\'t tell anyone about this.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Are you going alone?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'Yes, let them think I went to pick something up.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: '...Forgive me for saying this, but they will get suspicious.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'In that case, let them stay there with their questions.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Why do you have to go alone?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'I don\'t want to create new problems. You still have a lot of plans for that area, don\'t you?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'Besides, there\'s no need for my sister to know about what comes after the plan.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She lowers her head, ruminating the consequences keeping it from Alpha will bring.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'Given her way of doing things, she won\'t let me go to the Arctic alone either... will she?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'In that case, let her intercept the Forest Guards.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'After the battle at Kowloong, she definitely has questions for Rosetta.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory55.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'α', 3: 'You seem irritated.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'If it\'s "stupid things as always," you wouldn\'t be making that expression. Does it have anything to do with what Huaxu showed you?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: '...The institute brought back some memories from my past.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha remains silent for a moment. Obviously, she knows what Luna meant by her past.'}
{3: 'That underground laboratory is used to imprison Amberia. It is an expression of their desire and arrogance, just like the military posts.'}

{3: 'But unlike the military posts, this debt is owed by the Arctic Route Union. When Amberia fell into a deep slumber, the area should have gone to the Forest Guards. The Ascendants need not have intervened.'}
{3: 'And that military post was destroyed through a combined effort when Alpha broke free...'}
{3: 'With Lamia\'s intervention, the plan against the Ascendants was no longer feasible and the parties ceased their cooperation.'}
{3: '...At least, that was what was assumed to have happened then.'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'I understand why you feel this way, but that wasn\'t the smartest course of action.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Luna', 3: 'You don\'t need to worry about me, Sister.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'No one can shake the power of Ascnet. Not as one person. Not as a group.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'α', 3: 'I wouldn\'t state the obvious.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'Destroying that institute can\'t change the past. It will only affect your mood.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'Do you want to do something for them?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Luna', 3: 'I only did what I wanted to do.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Luna hovers next to her sister and gazes off at the ruins in the distance.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'I\'m not interested in seeking justice for those "sinners."', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'I\'m only interested in uprooting the disgusting things that I hate.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'No matter if my actions benefit others, they will never thank me. But, I\'ve never sought humanity\'s gratitude.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'I only do what I want to do. And that\'s all I\'ll ever do.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She smiles fleetingly.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory345.jpg'}
{3: 'Alpha only knows what exactly was going on when she gets the news from Lamia.'}
{2: 'α', 3: '...I always seem to make inferences based on how you used to think as a child. That\'s me being arrogant.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Alpha opens her eyes, deciding to do a sweep of the greenhouse just to be sure before leaving.'}
{3: 'Since the emergence of the noise, she is often pulled into her memories.'}
{3: 'The voices seem to be trying to evoke a certain emotion by blazing through her M.I.N.D.'}
{3: 'Just as she is about to head to the greenhouse, she sees Cinderelik walking over, hugging the remnants of a familiar mechanoid.'}
{3: 'A question popped into Alpha\'s mind.'}
{3: 'That girl has the ability to create Hetero-Creatures... Can she use that to revive Gabriel?'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'No, that\'s impossible.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Even if she forges a new body for him, there is no way Gabriel would return as good as new.'}
{3: 'So why is Cinderelik recycling his head?'}
{3: 'Multiple possibilities flash through Alpha\'s head, but none was plausible.'}
{3: 'In order the quell the unease she is feeling, Alpha follows Cinderelik.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory345.jpg'}
{2: '【kuroname】', 3: 'Stop her!'}
{3: 'Just as Cinderelik starts singing, Alpha hears a familiar voice on the other side of the door.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'α', 3: 'It\'s that commandant. The Gray Ravens are here too?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The Gray Ravens aren\'t currently the main target, so Alpha sees no need to clash with them. Instead, she flattens herself against the wall and hides a distance away in the shadows.'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: 'Well, now you have the chance to ask and find out if the commandant knows what happened to Luna.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'While pondering the noise\'s suggestion, the surrounding area starts to shake violently and rocks are even falling from the ceiling.'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'No, it looks like the shaking is coming from the greenhouse. Could it be Cinderelik?'}
{3: 'She gazes in the direction of the greenhouse, remembering the behemoth "sleeping" above.'}
{3: 'Upon sensing its presence, Alpha\'s M.I.N.D. receives an encrypted message from Ascnet.'}
{3: 'It is like a whisper in her ear, speaking a language that only she understands and making clear the future it will bring.'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'If it killed the Gray Ravens, things would go back to what they were before.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She wants to stop them, but she senses they might be stronger than she gives them credit for. While watching, she notices a dark figure emerging.'}
{3: 'He seems to notice something. Before stepping into the greenhouse, he looks back at where Alpha is hiding.'}
{3: 'A brief moment of silence passes and Alpha steps out of the shadows and heads toward the greenhouse.'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'I need those who know the truth to survive.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'Whether it\'s about Vonnegut or her frame, it\'ll all be in my favor.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'The former will result in the humans\' spear being pointed somewhere else, while the latter will rattle the Gray Ravens.', 4: '1'}
{2: '???', 3: 'What do you expect them to do?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'I need a seed that can break this deadlock.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'α', 3: 'There needs to be uncertainty in the world for it to be interesting, isn\'t that so?', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory311.png'}
{3: 'Alpha follows the footsteps of the group, and comes upon a wide platform outside. Vonnegut\'s unique oppressive voice booms from the platform.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'Welcome! Everyone is probably worried about what my next step will be, right?'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'To be honest, my purpose has been clear all along and that\'s to advance the filtering.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'As such, I always welcome new blood.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'But even if I issue you an invitation now, there will only be one answer.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'I\'d love to tell you all about our aspirations and ideals so that you can understand the importance of Ascnet and the filtering...'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'But when you are in a group, it\'s easy to buy into the illusion that you have a fighting chance.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'No matter what I say at this moment, you won\'t listen, so...'}
{3: 'Vonnegut raises his index finger and thumb like a gun and takes aim at the group.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'Bang—!'}
{3: 'As he makes that sound, rays of light almost invisible to the naked eye fire from behind the group.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'α', 3: 'His control over Ascnet\'s power is very precise.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Witnessing such an unexpected attack, Alpha refrains from getting involved for now and observes Vonnegut\'s battle style.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Commandant!'}
{3: 'Lucia senses a ray behind her but does not try to dodge it. Instead, she rushes toward you while blocking the attacks aimed at the others with her katana.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'α', 3: '...She\'s still so naive, but her senses have sharpened.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'You may have remained unscathed under Lucia\'s protection, but she is not fast enough to block the final strike.'}
{2: '【kuroname】', 3: 'Lucia!'}
{3: 'She staggers back, clutching her wound. Red vital fluid leaks from her right shoulder. The wound is deep, although the internal structure is undamaged.'}
{3: 'She raises her head and looks around. Besides herself, everyone else has more or less taken some damage from this unexpected attack.'}
{2: '【kuroname】', 3: 'Wanshi! I\'ll leave it to you!'}
{3: 'The Construct you call Wanshi hurries over to Lucia\'s side.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'It\'s okay, I can still fight.'}
{2: 'Wanshi', 3: '...Do you want to turn off the pain module?'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'There\'s no need to risk M.I.N.D. deviation with only this level of pain.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'You can try all you want, but I still have lots of tricks up my sleeve. I can keep this up until you decide to obey me.'}
{2: 'Kamui', 3: 'Are you going back on your agreement with Chrome?!'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'No, but I only agreed not to kill you. I didn\'t promise anything else.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'Didn\'t the commandant over there let two flies go as well?'}
{2: '【kuroname】', 3: 'You mean Reyna and Percy?'}
{3: 'Vonnegut gives a noncommittal smile.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'It doesn\'t matter. I have no use for the weak. I won\'t even waste my time on them.'}
{2: 'Vonnegut', 3: 'But as for you...'}
{3: 'Although she can continue watching on the sidelines, given "her"" style of doing things, ""she" will be handing over tactical deployment to you.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'α', 3: 'An ignorant human, no less...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Alpha strides over to the group.'}
